titleStmt.title: SII 23.53: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 53. (A.R. No. 53 of 1907.) Pūtalapaṭṭu, Chittoor Taluk, Chittoor District On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in the Śiva temple Kṛishṇadēvarāya: Śaka 1438: 1516-17 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1438, Īśvara, Tulā, śu. 14, Monday, probably corresponding to A.D. 1517, September 28. Details are irregular. It registers an agreement among the merchants (Ayyāvaḷi Pekkaṇḍār) and sundry tradesmen from several places carrying on their profession in the Nāvalan-perunteruvu (street) at Puttalaippaṭṭu in Paḷuvūrkōṭṭam, a division of Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam, fixing the rate of magamai impost payable by them to the temple of Bhīmīśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār at the place, on the different articles of merchandise. These are specified as follows: cattle, cotton yarn, cotton cloth, cotton wool, areca-nut, pepper, silk yarn, oil, cummin seed, sesamum, jaggery, salt, turmeric, sugar, ghee, buffalo, rice and ginger.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastī . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara bhā
ṣaikkut tappuva Irāyar kaṇṭa muvarā
yarkaṇḍa pūrvapa(pa)ccima Uttara te[kṣa]ṇa
samutturātibhati śrīvirapratāva kiruṣṇa
tevamahārāyar piṟativirā
cciyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śa
kāttam 1000 4 100 3 10 8- mel cellā
niṉṟa Īśvarasamvassarattu tulānāyaṟṟu
purvapakṣattil catudeśiyum catu da
śiyum peṟṟa somavāranāḷ nāvalanpe
runteruvil nānaātecattil Añvattāṟu tecatti
l Ayyāvaḷi cālumūlai pekkaṇṭā
rum palapaṭṭaṭaiyārum puttalaippaṭṭu
(ṭa) toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu paḷuvūṟkoṭṭattu
bhimiśvaramuṭaiya nayināṟku makamaikuṭuttom In
ta mukarappaṟṟil tuṟaiyil Ātimāṟkam taṭakkum
carakku pañcu malavai Aṟtamāṉiyam viṭṭut taril(kkāl ?)
naṭai Añcukku ṭṭaka ṉūl poti Oṉṟukku ṭṭa ve
ṉūl mārāppu Oṉṟukku [9 10 8] piṭavai poti 1- kku ṭṭava
parutti malavai 1- kku 9 10 4 piṭavai cumai 1- kku 9 10 4
pākku poti Oṉṟukku ṭṭava cillaṟai pacaṟai pacavai �
pākku mārāppu 1- kku 9 10 4 pācilaikāy poti 1- kku ṭṭava
miḷaku poti 1- kku ṭṭava paṭṭuṉūl poti 1- kku ṭṭava cumaikku ṭṭava
miḷaku mārāppu 1- kku 9 10 4 Eṇṇai poti 1- kku ṭṭava cumaikku 9
cirakam poti 1- kku ṭṭava mārāppu 1- kku 9 10 8 Eḷḷu potikku 9 10 4
vellam poti 1- kku 9 10 4 mārāppu 1- kku 9 10 8 Uppu potikku 9va
mañcaḷ poti 1- kku 9 10 4 mārāppu 1- kku 9 10 8 Uppu poti 9 10 4
carkkarai poti 1- kku ṭṭava ney cumaikku 9 10 4 nellu
carkkarai mārāppu 1- kku 9 10 6 Erumai-kku ṭṭañca Arici 9va
Iñci poti 1- kku 9 10 5 cukkuppoti 1- kku ṭṭañca mārāppu-kku 9jha
Immaritāti piṟakārattile makamai cantiṟātittavarai Uṭai
yāṟku naṭakkumpaṭi nāṅkaḷ tārāpūṟuvam paṇṇi
kkuṭuttom Inta tarmmattai yātoruttar Akitam pa
ṇṇinārkaḷ keṅkai karaiyil kārāmpacuvaik
koṉti pāvattil pokakkaṭavaṉṉākavum Ippaṭikku
ccammatittu bhimiśvaramuṭaiya nayināṟkut tanmma cātaṉam paStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
